headline.zh-CN: 修复母带页漏翻译文案

summary.zh-CN: 母带交付和终审页面现在会显示正常的交付说明、交付类型和曲师标签，不再暴露翻译键名。
summary.en: Master delivery and final-review pages now show proper delivery notes, delivery type, and composer labels instead of raw translation keys.

description.zh-CN: 母带交付输入框、交付版本历史和终审审批状态现在都会显示对应的中英文文案。
description.en: The delivery input, delivery version history, and final-review approval status now show localized copy in both languages.
